10.response: {"Q0":"I got a little confused when the astronaut left the planet. I thought after that round ended the new round would reset the game."}

5.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I thought the round was over and the planets had been reset."}

0.response: {"Q0":"My strategy was to understand the instructions clearly and remember which key is associated with the right symbol/image in order to make meaningful decisions."}

7.response: {"Q0":"No, it didn't, I just kept on collecting as much as I could at the time."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Visiting the planets was much easier to focus on without making too many mistakes because of the time allotted to completing the task."}

1.response: {"Q0":"No changes to strategy in the game."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I found more gems on the blue planet more frequently compared to the red planet, on an average of 68 percent of the time."}

8.response: {"Q0":"The amount of money and the odds of winning."}

12.response: {"Q0":"About 3 of the planets render late after the 3 seconds to choose mark."}

BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"2. I am disappointed in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"2. If you are paying attention.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"1-. My appetite is somewhat less than usual.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"1. I am less interested in sex than I used to be."}
